bio: I tinker with hardware, write software, and occasionally share what I learn on my blog. Right now I'm especially interested in IoT, calculator hacking, and full-stack web development.
When I'm not coding, you can probably find me exploring new tech, working on side projects, or diving deep into some obscure rabbit hole.

timeline.title: Senior Year — Suffield Academy
timeline.description: Full-stack web development, personal projects, and college prep.

timeline.title: Junior Year — Suffield Academy
timeline.description: Deep dive into IoT, embedded systems with ESP32, and calculator hacking.

timeline.title: Summer Projects
timeline.description: Built side projects, explored machine learning, and sharpened coding skills.

timeline.title: Getting Started
timeline.description: First steps into programming — Python scripting, HTML/CSS, and hardware tinkering.
